datapoints.description: Cluster quorum status (1=in quorum, 0=not in quorum)
datapoints.name: quorum_status

datapoints.description: Total number of nodes in the Portworx cluster
datapoints.name: cluster_size

datapoints.description: Number of online nodes in the cluster
datapoints.name: nodes_online

datapoints.description: Number of offline nodes in the cluster
datapoints.name: nodes_offline

datapoints.description: Total cluster storage capacity in bytes
datapoints.name: total_bytes

datapoints.description: Bytes of pending I/O operations across the cluster
datapoints.name: pending_io

description: Portworx cluster health, quorum status, node counts, storage capacity, and resource utilization via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Cluster-level metrics from px_cluster_status (quorum, node counts), px_cluster_disk (capacity), px_cluster_cpu_percent, and px_cluster_memory_utilized_percent. Storage utilization computed as (used/total)*100. All metrics use or vector(0) fallback.
name: Portworx_Cluster_Overview
